title: SHADED Scene Project
description: Round-trippable structural state of a SHADED scene: the 13 canonical window.SHADED parameters (CLAUDE.md Invariante 6), placed SWIFT actor bundles, and the story/act timeline (window.SHADED.story.board()). Produced/consumed by editor/facade.js (exportProject/loadProject) and tools/orchestrate.js. Image/manifest BYTES are never embedded here (JSON cannot carry them, and the engine does not expose already-loaded assets for re-export) — actor entries carry a human-readable 'label' only; a real loadProject() call must be given the actual files again out-of-band.

params.description: Subset of window.SHADED's 13 canonical high-level parameters (CLAUDE.md Invariante 6). Unset keys keep the engine's current/default value.

actors.description: Placed SWIFT sprite-sheet actors (window.SHADED.addActor() calls). One entry per assets.actorFiles[i] passed to facade.loadProject().

label.description: Informational only (e.g. the sprite-sheet's original file name) — not re-loadable from this field alone.

storyboard.description: Verbatim contents of window.SHADED.story.board() — the same live array StoryboardTimeline and playStory()/tickStory() already share, not a second storyboard truth.

p.description: Snapshot of window.SHADED.getParams() at capture time — the field name 'p' matches StoryboardTimeline.addStepFromCurrentParams() exactly, not renamed here.
